name: PPY Cup
short_description: Standard PP cup for milktea and cold drinks — affordable and food-grade.
long_description: The PPY Cup is an everyday polypropylene cup built for high-volume milktea shops and cafes. Lightweight yet sturdy, it delivers consistent clarity and durability at a competitive price. Compatible with standard 90mm dome and flat lids.
best_for: Milktea Shops, Coffee Houses, and Catering Events.

name: UCUP
short_description: Premium U-shaped PP cup — crystal clear with a modern profile.
long_description: The UCUP features a distinctive U-shaped design that enhances drink presentation. Made from food-grade polypropylene with superior clarity, it's perfect for showcasing layered milktea and fruit drinks. Compatible with standard 90mm lids.
best_for: Milktea Shops, Juice Bars, and Premium Cafes.

name: Slim Cup
short_description: Sleek slim-profile PP cup — ergonomic grip, great for on-the-go drinks.
long_description: The Slim Cup is designed with a narrower diameter for a comfortable grip and a modern, elegant appearance. Ideal for shops that want a premium aesthetic. Made from food-grade polypropylene and compatible with standard slim lids.
best_for: Premium Milktea Shops, Coffee Shops, and Takeaway Counters.

name: Doublewall Cup with Lid
short_description: Insulated doublewall cup with lid — keeps drinks hot or cold longer.
long_description: The Doublewall Cup features a dual-wall construction that provides superior insulation, keeping cold drinks chilled and hot drinks warm. Includes a matching lid. Made from premium food-grade materials, perfect for specialty coffee and hot milktea. A best-seller for dine-in and takeaway.
best_for: Coffee Shops, Hot Beverage Stalls, and Premium Milktea Outlets.

name: PET Cup 95mm
short_description: Crystal-clear PET cup with 95mm diameter opening — vibrant and recyclable.
long_description: The PET Cup (95mm) is made from polyethylene terephthalate, offering exceptional clarity that makes every drink look irresistible. Lightweight, BPA-free, and recyclable. Compatible with 95mm strawless and dome lids. Ideal for showcasing layered drinks and fruit teas.
best_for: Milktea Shops, Fruit Tea Stalls, and Specialty Drink Outlets.

name: PET Cup 98mm
short_description: Wide-mouth crystal-clear PET cup with 98mm diameter — great for toppings-heavy drinks.
long_description: The PET Cup (98mm) features a wider 98mm opening, perfect for drinks loaded with pearls, jellies, and other toppings. Made from high-clarity, BPA-free PET material. Compatible with 98mm strawless and dome lids. Recyclable and food-safe.
best_for: Milktea Shops, Dessert Drinks, and Topping-Heavy Beverages.

name: Dome Lid
short_description: Classic dome-shaped lid — fits standard 90mm and 98mm cup openings.
long_description: The Dome Lid features a raised dome design that accommodates whipped cream, tapioca pearls, and other toppings. Made from food-grade PP material. Available in 90mm (standard) and 98mm sizes to fit a wide range of cups.
best_for: Milktea Cups, Smoothie Cups, and Topping-Heavy Drinks.

name: Strawless Lid
short_description: Eco-friendly strawless lid — sip-directly design, fits 90mm, 95mm, and 98mm cups.
long_description: The Strawless Lid promotes sustainable drinking with its no-straw sip design. A flat top with a drinking spout allows customers to sip directly from the cup. Available in three diameters (90mm, 95mm, 98mm) to cover all major cup types. Made from food-grade PP.
best_for: Eco-Friendly Shops, Cold Brew, and Juice Bars.

name: Flat Lid
short_description: Flat-profile lid — clean, minimal design for no-straw or straw-hole use.
long_description: The Flat Lid provides a clean, low-profile seal for standard cups. Ideal for drinks that don't need a dome top. Made from food-grade PP and features a secure snap-fit for leak prevention.
best_for: Standard Milktea Cups, Coffee, and Cold Drinks.

name: Conjoined Lid
short_description: Double-cup conjoined lid — connects two cups for easy carrying.
long_description: The Conjoined Lid is a unique dual-cup lid that connects two cups side by side, making it effortless to carry two drinks at once without a bag or tray. A popular add-on for couple orders and takeaway deals. Made from food-grade PP.
best_for: Takeaway Orders, Couple Deals, and Events.

name: Black Straw
short_description: Sleek black PP straw — stylish and sturdy for all cup types.
long_description: The Black Straw is made from food-grade polypropylene in a classic matte black finish. Pairs perfectly with any cup and adds a premium aesthetic to your drinks. Durable enough to pierce sealed cups without bending.
best_for: All Beverage Types, Milktea Shops, and Coffee Outlets.

name: Paper Bowl
short_description: Eco-friendly paper bowl for soups, noodles, and hot meals — available in 6 sizes.
long_description: The Paper Bowl is crafted from food-grade paperboard with a PE-coated interior for leak resistance. Perfect for hot soups, noodles, congee, and other moist foods. A staple for food stalls, canteens, and delivery kitchens. Available in 6 sizes from 220cc up to 750cc.
best_for: Food Stalls, Canteens, Delivery Kitchens, and Catering Events.

name: Paper Cup
short_description: Single-wall paper cup for hot and cold drinks — available in 8 sizes from 3oz to 22oz.
long_description: Our Paper Cups are made from food-grade paperboard with a PE-lined interior to prevent leaks and maintain temperature. Suitable for hot coffee, tea, cold drinks, and juices. Available in 8 sizes to serve everything from a quick espresso shot to a large iced beverage. Customizable with screen or flexographic printing.
best_for: Coffee Shops, Canteens, Events, and Takeaway Stalls.

name: Spaghetti Box
short_description: Rectangular paper box sized perfectly for spaghetti and pasta servings.
long_description: The Spaghetti Box is a long, rectangular food-grade paper box designed to hold a single serving of spaghetti or pasta. PE-coated interior prevents sauce leaks. Ideal for food stalls, school canteens, and takeaway counters offering pasta dishes.
best_for: Food Stalls, Canteens, School Tuck Shops, and Catering.

name: Burger Box
short_description: Clamshell burger box — keeps burgers fresh, warm, and intact.
long_description: The Burger Box features a clamshell design that locks in heat and keeps your burger intact during transport. Made from food-grade paperboard with a grease-resistant lining. A must-have for burger stalls and fast-food counters.
best_for: Burger Stalls, Fast Food, and Food Delivery.

name: Meal Box
short_description: Standard paper meal box for rice and viand combos — available in 750cc and 880cc.
long_description: The Meal Box is the go-to container for rice meal servings. Made from food-grade paperboard with a PE-coated interior for grease and moisture resistance. Available in two sizes — 750cc for standard meals and 880cc for larger servings. Suitable for carinderias, food stalls, and catering.
best_for: Carinderias, Food Stalls, Catering, and Takeaway Counters.

name: High Meal Box
short_description: Tall-profile meal box — ideal for bulkier meals with heaping toppings.
long_description: The High Meal Box features greater height than a standard meal box, making it perfect for generous servings with rice, saucy viands, or layered dishes. Grease-resistant PE-coated interior keeps everything secure during transport. A popular choice for catering and generous meal deals.
best_for: Catering, Generous Meal Servings, and Food Stalls.

name: Lechon Take Out Bag
short_description: Heavy-duty grease-resistant bag for lechon and roasted meat takeout.
long_description: The Lechon Take Out Bag is built to handle greasy, heavy roasted meat servings. Made from thick, grease-resistant food-grade paper with reinforced handles. Perfect for lechon stalls, roasted chicken shops, and BBQ counters. Keeps the juices in and the bag intact.
best_for: Lechon Stalls, Roasted Chicken Shops, BBQ Counters, and Catering.

name: 2-Division Box
short_description: Two-compartment paper box — keeps rice and viand neatly separated.
long_description: The 2-Division Box features an internal divider that keeps rice and viand in separate compartments, preventing mixing during transport. Made from food-grade paperboard with a grease-resistant coating. Ideal for combo meal packaging and carinderias.
best_for: Carinderias, Combo Meals, Catering, and Food Stalls.

name: Hotdog Box
short_description: Elongated paper box designed to hold hotdog sandwiches and corn dogs.
long_description: The Hotdog Box is a narrow, elongated food-grade paper box perfectly sized for hotdog sandwiches, corn dogs, and long sausage sandwiches. Grease-resistant lining prevents soaking. A popular choice for school canteens, fairs, and street food stalls.
best_for: Street Food Stalls, School Canteens, Fairs, and Events.
